commit.message:
feat: filter system overhaul + NSFW toggle + People blackout fix

Filters (all working now):
- Media type (ANIME/MANGA/BOTH): applied client-side via searchEntries.type
- Year range: applied via searchEntries.year
- NSFW toggle (off by default): hides isAdult=true media; fallback heuristic
  for old data: hides any media whose genres include 'Hentai'
- Genres: autocomplete + client-side filter via new genre_to_media.json index
  (intersection: media must have ALL selected genres)
- Tags: autocomplete + client-side filter via tag_to_media.json
  (intersection: media must have ALL selected tags)

Autocomplete (all three panels):
- New shared AutocompleteInput component: keyboard navigation (↑↓ Enter Esc),
  match highlighting, prefix-first sort, excludes already-selected items
- MediaFiltersPanel: genres (with EN↔JP display) + tags (English-only,
  AniList API has no native-language tag names)
- PeopleFiltersPanel: roles autocomplete from role_to_people.json
- TalentFinder: roles + tags/genres both with autocomplete

JP genre labels:
- Genres display in Japanese when lang=JP (static translation map)
- Stored values remain in English internally; display is translated on render
- Tags stay English — AniList does not expose native tag names via API

People mode blackout fix:
- setPoints() now checks vis.length BEFORE removing sprites
- If new mode has no visible points, the old canvas content is kept intact
- The empty-state overlay handles the UI; no black flash on mode switch
- setPoints() accepts fitCamera param; false when filters change (no camera
  jump), true only on mode change

Build artifacts:
- search.json now includes isAdult (genre Hentai check) and genres fields
- New genre_to_media.json index for fast client-side genre filtering
- Both activated on next ingest run

commit.message:
Phase 3: Checkout + Order system + Payment methods from CMS

CHECKOUT PAGE (/commande):
- Order summary with all items, shipping, discount, total
- Saved addresses selection (from account)
- Payment method selection (from Sanity CMS)
- Final stock check before order placement
- Loading state + error handling

ORDER CREATION API (POST /api/orders/create):
- Server-side validation of all prices from Sanity
- Stock verification (rejects if insufficient)
- Automatic stock decrement after order
- Creates order in both Sanity + Postgres
- Generates unique order number
- Supports logged-in + guest customers

ORDER CONFIRMATION (/commande/confirmation):
- Order number display
- Payment instructions (6 languages)
- Links to account/home

PAYMENT METHODS:
- New Sanity schema: paymentMethod (activate/deactivate from CMS)
- API: GET /api/payment/methods
- Pre-built for: in_store, stripe, paypal, apple_pay, google_pay, bank_transfer
- Only active methods shown to customers

SHIPPING CARRIERS (future-ready):
- Updated shippingMethod schema with carrier integration fields
- Supports: Colissimo, Chronopost, Mondial Relay, DPD, DHL, UPS, GLS
- Tracking URL template with {tracking} variable
- API key field for future carrier API integration

fix: narrow license expiry analyzer glob to app container only (#44)

The glob `app/**/*.log` matched all 4 container logs (3 init containers
+ main app), causing 4 duplicate license expiry warnings. Changed to
`app/**/app.log` to target only the main container's log.

commit.message:
Upgrade ASR to Nemotron 0.6B for better accent recognition

- Switch from Zipformer (68MB) to NVIDIA Nemotron 0.6B int8 (632MB)
- Best available accuracy for accented/non-native English speakers
- Relax endpoint timing: 1.5s silence threshold (was 1.0s),
  60s max utterance (was 30s) so user can speak longer
- Remove hallucination filter (not needed with Nemotron)
- Increase inference threads to 4 for the larger model

commit.message:
Add UPS confirm preview page before booking + fix transit time request

Booking flow: action_btn=ups_book → ups_confirm_view (GET preview) →
confirm POST → ups_book_view (API call). Mirrors Jumingo confirm flow.

ups_confirm.html shows:
- Selected service (code + name) + account
- Shipper and recipient addresses side by side
- Packages table (weight + dimensions)
- Customs declaration table (items with HS codes) for intl shipments
- Warning if customs weight ≠ package weight
- Confirmation notice with void info before submitting

ups_confirm_view: GET builds preview from _ups_extract_*; POST
redirects to ups_book_view?service_code=XX (no logic duplication).

ups_client._rate_shop: add Pickup.Time='1000' to DeliveryTimeInformation
(required by Shoptimeintransit for TimeInTransit data); add
logger.warning when falling back to plain Shop endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace direct arm retargeting with pose-modulated noise

Direct bone retargeting from pose landmarks caused unnatural arm positions
(clipping through body, impossible poses) due to bone-local coordinate
system mismatches. New approach: pose data modulates noise amplitude
instead of driving bone rotations directly. Arms always stay in natural
noise-generated poses while reacting proportionally to user's body
movement. Spine lean is the only directly-tracked rotation (simple
pitch/roll from vertical, safely clamped).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refonte design v3: style géométrique indigo avec hero centré, anneaux animés, services alternés

Design unique: fond blanc, accent indigo vibrant, hero plein écran avec anneaux
rotatifs, services en rangées alternées, DM Serif Display, texture grain subtile.

commit.message:
Smart cart protection: stock validation at every critical step

NEW API: POST /api/cart/check-stock
- Checks real-time stock from Sanity (useCdn: false)
- Returns: available stock, price, validity per item
- Identifies: out_of_stock, quantity_reduced, product_unavailable

Cart store: checkStock() action
- Auto-removes unavailable items
- Auto-reduces quantity to available stock
- Updates prices from server (prevents stale prices)

Cart page (/panier):
- Stock check on page load (onMounted)
- Stock check before checkout (final verification)
- Yellow warning banner with list of changes
- If stock changed → blocks checkout until user reviews

Scenarios covered:
- Item added yesterday, sold out today → removed with message
- 2 people buying last item → first gets it, second sees "out of stock"
- Price changed → updated silently
- Cart persists in localStorage → survives page refresh/close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: mejoras en integración Google Sheets y BookingModal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix test notification to use real push pipeline, add error feedback

The previous 'Send test notification' button used reg.showNotification()
which fires a local notification directly on the device — it never touches
the push server, so it always 'works' even when scheduled pushes are broken.

Replaced with a server-side /api/push/test route that sends through the
actual web-push library to the stored subscription endpoint. If the
subscription is expired/invalid (HTTP 410/404), the error message tells
the user to tap 'Re-register subscription' to fix it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix UPS transit days: add PickupDate to Shoptimeintransit request

UPS Shoptimeintransit requires DeliveryTimeInformation.Pickup.Date
(YYYYMMDD) to return TimeInTransit data per shipment. Without it
BusinessDaysInTransit and Arrival.Date are absent → transit shows —.

commit.message:
fix: Chrome CDP as standalone deployment (sidecar didn't render in app-template)

TrueCharts app-template v17 silently dropped the sidecar container config.
Switch to a standalone Deployment + ClusterIP Service for Chrome CDP:

- Deployment: chrome-cdp (ghcr.io/zachbomb/triparr-bot-chrome:latest)
- Service: chrome-cdp.triparr-bot.svc.cluster.local:9222
- PVC: 1Gi for persistent Chrome profile (Akamai clearance cookies)
- /dev/shm: 512Mi tmpfs for Chrome stability
- Probes: TCP 9222 (startup/readiness/liveness)
- Limits: 1 CPU, 1.5Gi memory

Bot connects via BA_CDP_URL=http://chrome-cdp.triparr-bot.svc.cluster.local:9222

Also adds ENABLE_BA_SCRAPER=true and ENABLE_ANA_SCRAPER=true to bot env.

v118: Fix broken ticker logos - replace AllInvestView with Parqet CDN

AllInvestView API is now blocked by Cloudflare, returning challenge pages
instead of logo data. EODHD fallback also 404s for major tickers (AAPL,
AMZN, GOOGL). New fallback chain:
1. Parqet CDN (high-quality SVGs, works for all Mag 7 + most US stocks)
2. EODHD (validated with HEAD request, no longer caches 404 URLs)
3. Text initials fallback (existing behavior)

Also clears stale AllInvestView cache entries on first load.

commit.message:
Add hn_fetcher for fetching HackerNews content to Markdown

Dual-API client (Firebase + Algolia) that fetches stories with comment
trees, search results, story lists, and user profiles. Uses TaskGroup +
Semaphore for bounded concurrent fetching, Algolia /items/:id for
single-call complete comment trees, and Firebase for story lists.

Subcommands: story, search, top/new/best/ask/show/job, user.
Output integrates with the existing search index at output/docs/hn/.

85 new tests (1574 total).

feat: Chrome CDP sidecar + scraper feature flags for Triparr

Add Chrome sidecar container to Triparr pod for BA/ANA award scrapers:
- ghcr.io/zachbomb/triparr-bot-chrome:latest (real Google Chrome, CDP on 9222)
- 1Gi PVC for persistent Chrome profile (Akamai clearance cookies)
- 512Mi shared memory (/dev/shm) for Chrome stability
- TCP health/readiness/startup probes on port 9222
- Resource limits: 1 CPU, 1Gi memory

Environment changes:
- ENABLE_BA_SCRAPER=true, ENABLE_ANA_SCRAPER=true
- BA_CDP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9222 (pod-local CDP)
- BA_CHROME_PROFILE=/chrome-data/ba-profile

Architecture: Bot container connects to Chrome sidecar via CDP WebSocket.
Chrome handles all HTTP requests to BA with authentic TLS fingerprint.
Scraper sends commands via Patchright's connectOverCDP().

feat(api): auto-send confirmation & cancellation emails on booking events

  fetches booking, creates Google Meet for TELEMEDICINA, sends confirmation email,
  sets confirmationEmailSentAt so UI defaults to Reenviar

  Calendar events when ensureMeetLink runs before googleEventId is persisted

docs(wiki): scaffold Grid Tactics Semantic Wiki subproject

New subproject at wiki/ for a fully-automated Semantic MediaWiki that
mirrors the game's current state via git hooks. Locked tech stack:
MediaWiki + Semantic MediaWiki extension, Docker, deployed to Railway.

Scaffolded via gsd-roadmapper:
- wiki/.planning/PROJECT.md — vision, stack, constraints, relationship
  to parent grid-tactics project
- wiki/.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md — 38 reqs in v1/v1.1 (AUTO, WIKI, CARD,
  PATCH, SEMANTIC, DEPLOY, POLISH), 2 POLISH reqs deferred to future
- wiki/.planning/ROADMAP.md — 9 phases in dependency order, every req
  mapped to ≥1 phase
- wiki/.planning/STATE.md — initial state, v1 milestone, Phase 1 planning
- wiki/.planning/config.json — interactive mode
- wiki/README.md — subproject intro + dev pointers

Source of truth stays canonical: data/cards/*.json and enums.py. Wiki
is a projection updated via git hooks calling the MediaWiki API. Every
commit that touches card/mechanic files generates a Patch:X.Y.Z page.

Next: cd wiki && /gsd:plan-phase 1 (Foundation & Schema Design)

perf: add CachedDisplayName column to MetaverseObjects for sort performance (#482)

Denormalised DisplayName onto MetaverseObjects as CachedDisplayName,
eliminating the correlated subquery that sorted 100k rows by an EAV
attribute value (~300ms). The column is kept in sync by
ApplyPendingAttributeChanges() during sync operations. Migration
backfills from existing attribute values and adds composite index
(TypeId, CachedDisplayName). Also removes temporary [PERF] debug
logging. MVO Users page sort drops from ~300ms to ~7ms at 100k scale.
